markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on feedback for comparison articles and finalize the PSEO proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Comparison articles require a strategic pivot:** Content must target an underwriting audience, use a feature-by-feature format, and be \~30–40% shorter to improve readability and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**PSEO proposal approved:** The team will build a programmatic content engine for "Line of Business + Pricing Factors" guides, using HX's internal and "messy" customer-facing taxonomies to capture real-world search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**PSEO content structure defined:** Guides will use actuarial terms (`Exposure measures`, `Risk attributes`) and include a `Data sources` section to create a robust, interlinked content hub.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [**Next steps are clear:** GrowthX will revise comparison articles and deliver a PSEO template by EOY; HX will provide design support by mid-January.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)

## Topics

### Comparison Article Feedback

  - [**Problem:** Articles are misaligned with the target audience and contain factual errors.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**Audience Mismatch:** Content is too actuarial, failing to resonate with the primary underwriting searcher.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**Example (Federato):** Article positions HX as a pricing/actuarial tool vs. Federato's underwriting platform, missing HX's own underwriting capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**Factual Inaccuracies:** Articles contain errors like incorrect product names (`HX underwriting platform`) and misrepresent competitor features (e.g., Conwer's workbench).](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Format & Positioning Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Length:** Articles are too long, hindering readability and increasing the chance of errors.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Structure:** The current "HX vs. Competitor" format is ineffective.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Articles sometimes disqualify HX from serving customer segments (e.g., MGAs) that it actually serves.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### PSEO Proposal: Line of Business + Pricing Factors

  - [**Goal:** Create a scalable, programmatic content engine for "Line of Business + Pricing Factors" guides.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** Faster content production with reduced editorial oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Business Impact:** Targets down-funnel keywords to drive qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Taxonomy:** Use both HX's internal taxonomy and the "messy" customer-facing list to capture real-world search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [**Content Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Headers:** Use precise actuarial terms (`Exposure measures`, `Risk attributes`, `Pricing methods`, `Rating factors`).](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
      - [**Content:** Include a `Data sources` section to create a robust, interlinked content hub.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [**Source Material:**](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
      - [**Primary:** The AI pipeline will generate content from its own research.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
      - [**Secondary:** Supplement with HX demo transcripts and academic papers (e.g., Parodi's book on modeling).](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
      - [Revise comparison articles based on feedback (audience, format, length).](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [Diagnose the root cause of factual errors (research vs. positioning doc).](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
      - [Update the PSEO template with new headers and titles.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
      - [Deliver the revised PSEO template by EOY 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [**Hyperexponential:**](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
      - [Provide design support for the PSEO frontend by mid-January 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
      - [Review the revised PSEO template upon delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [**Bailey Seybolt:**](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
      - [Send an async report on current article performance and publishing status.](https://fathom.video/share/q4BmRzvicwCyANNDEMVxvSAsz3ryhAPC?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
